title: KIterator
content:
# KIterator


An iterator class that wraps another iterator and provides additional functionality.

Args:
    iterator (Iterator[Any]): The iterator to be wrapped.

Attributes:
    iterator (Iterator[Any]): The wrapped iterator.

Methods:
    __iter__(): Returns the iterator object itself.
    __next__(): Returns the next item from the iterator.
    to_df(): Convert the iterator's data into a pandas DataFrame.


## Methods


### __init__(iterator: Iterator[Any]) -> None


### to_df(datastreams_as_column: bool, data_quality_as_column: bool) -> pd.DataFrame

Convert the iterator's data into a pandas DataFrame.
summary: An iterator class that wraps another iterator and provides additional functionality.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.data_model.__init__()
